summary: Phase 1 feature expansion testing complete. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with all new features: Budget Manager, Loans & EMI tracker, Credit Cards manager, Health Score ring, Daily Spend Limit, Weekly Digest, and Stripe payment integration. Fixed .env file issue where STRIPE_API_KEY was on same line as EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
passed_tests: Login with admin@capitalcare.ai / Admin@123 - SUCCESS
Dashboard loads with 4 KPI cards (Total Balance, Monthly Income, Monthly Expenses, Savings Growth)
Dashboard shows Income vs Expenses line chart
Dashboard shows Spending Breakdown donut chart
Dashboard shows 3-Month Savings Forecast widget
Dashboard shows Smart Insights panel with goal funding alerts
Dashboard shows Savings Goals preview with progress bars
Dashboard shows Financial Health Score ring (68/100) with breakdown and tips
Dashboard shows Daily Spend Limit widget (₹0.00 remaining of ₹2,000.00)
Dashboard shows Weekly Digest (Spent, Saved, Top Category, vs Last Week)
Dashboard shows Quick Access Grid (Budgets, Loans & EMI, Credit Cards, Pricing)
Budget Manager page loads with Set Budget button
Budget form opens with category dropdown and limit input
Budget created for Groceries category with ₹15,000 limit
Budget shows progress bar with percentage and color coding (red for exceeded)
Budget shows 'exceeded' warning when over limit
Loans & EMI page loads with Add Loan button
Loan form opens with all required fields
Personal loan added with principal, interest rate, tenure, EMI
Loan card shows EMI details (Principal, EMI, Remaining, Interest Paid)
Loan shows EMIs paid progress bar (27/36) and next EMI date
Loan amortization table shows Month, EMI, Principal, Interest, Balance columns
Prepayment simulator input and Simulate button present
Credit Cards page loads with Add Card button
Credit utilization summary shows total utilization percentage (22.5%)
Credit card form opens with bank, card name, limit, outstanding fields
Credit card added (HDFC Regalia) with utilization calculated
Card shows Available, Outstanding, Utilization fields
Pricing page shows 3 tiers (Free $0, Pro $9.99, Elite $19.99)
Pricing page has Monthly/Yearly toggle with Save 20% badge
Pro tier has 'Most Popular' badge, Elite has 'Best Value' badge
Yearly pricing shows $95.99 Pro and $191.99 Elite with -20% badges
Stripe checkout creates session and redirects to checkout.stripe.com
Stripe checkout shows correct amount (US$9.99 for Pro monthly)
FAQ section with expandable questions
All pages maintain Cashly design (cream bg, white cards, coral accent)

test_classes: TestBudgets (4 tests) - get budgets, create budget, progress fields, delete budget
TestLoans (6 tests) - get loans, add loan, calculated fields, amortization table, prepayment simulator, delete loan
TestCreditCards (4 tests) - get cards, add card, utilization calculated, delete card
TestHealthScore (1 test) - score 0-100 with breakdown and tips
TestDailyLimit (2 tests) - get daily limit, set daily limit
TestWeeklyDigest (1 test) - spending summary with comparison
TestStripePayments (4 tests) - invalid plan 400, pro checkout, elite checkout, user plan
TestAutoSaveRules (2 tests) - get rules, create rule
TestDashboardIntegration (1 test) - dashboard loads with all data

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed .env file: STRIPE_API_KEY was concatenated with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY on same line, causing NoneType error
All Phase 1 features properly implemented: Budgets, Loans, Credit Cards, Health Score, Daily Limit, Weekly Digest, Subscriptions, Stripe
Health Score calculation includes: savings_rate, debt_to_income, emergency_fund, budget_adherence, investment_consistency
Loan amortization table correctly calculates principal, interest, and balance for each month
Prepayment simulator shows months_saved, interest_saved, new_tenure
Credit card utilization correctly calculated and color-coded (green <30%, red >30%)
Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout with test key
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Backend creates admin user on startup. Test data created during testing: Groceries budget (₹15,000), Personal loan (₹5L, 12%, 36 months), HDFC Regalia credit card (₹2L limit, ₹45K outstanding), Daily limit set to ₹2,000
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 feature expansion complete. New endpoints tested: /api/budgets, /api/loans, /api/loans/{id}/amortization, /api/loans/{id}/prepay-simulate, /api/credit-cards, /api/health-score, /api/daily-limit, /api/weekly-digest, /api/subscriptions, /api/autosave-rules, /api/payments/checkout, /api/payments/status/{session_id}, /api/user/plan. New pages: BudgetsPage, LoansPage, CreditCardsPage, updated PricingPage with Stripe, updated Dashboard with health score ring, weekly digest, quick access grid. All 28 backend tests pass. Stripe integration working with test key.

env_fix_applied.issue: STRIPE_API_KEY was on same line as EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in /app/backend/.env
env_fix_applied.fix: Added newline between EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and STRIPE_API_KEY
